standard: ASHRAE 90.1 — Energy Standard for Buildings Except Low-Rise Residential Buildings
source: Manually structured from ASHRAE 90.1-2019 — key energy minimums by climate zone. Not a verbatim reproduction.
legal_status: Manually structured summary of minimum requirements — not a reproduction of ASHRAE copyrighted text

climate_zones.1: Very Hot — Humid (1A) or Dry (1B): Miami, Honolulu
climate_zones.2: Hot — Humid (2A) or Dry (2B): Houston, Phoenix
climate_zones.3: Warm — Humid (3A), Dry (3B), or Marine (3C): Atlanta, Las Vegas, San Francisco
climate_zones.4: Mixed — Humid (4A), Dry (4B), or Marine (4C): Baltimore, Albuquerque, Seattle
climate_zones.5: Cool — Humid (5A), Dry (5B), or Marine (5C): Chicago, Denver, Portland OR
climate_zones.6: Cold — Humid (6A) or Dry (6B): Minneapolis, Helena

sections.title: Envelope — Above-Grade Wall Insulation (Mass Walls)
sections.requirement: Minimum continuous insulation R-values for mass walls (CMU, concrete, brick) by climate zone: CZ1: R-0; CZ2: R-0; CZ3: R-0; CZ4: R-7.6ci; CZ5: R-7.6ci; CZ6: R-11.4ci; CZ7: R-14.4ci; CZ8: R-18.8ci. ci = continuous insulation.

sections.title: Envelope — Above-Grade Wall Insulation (Metal Building Walls)
sections.requirement: Minimum insulation R-values for metal building walls by climate zone: CZ1-2: R-13.0; CZ3-5: R-13.0+R-7.5ci; CZ6-8: R-13.0+R-15.6ci. Values are minimum continuous insulation or cavity insulation plus continuous insulation.

sections.title: Envelope — Above-Grade Wall Insulation (Steel Framed Walls)
sections.requirement: Minimum insulation for steel-framed walls by climate zone. Cavity + continuous: CZ1: R-13+R-0; CZ2: R-13+R-3.8ci; CZ3: R-13+R-7.5ci; CZ4: R-13+R-7.5ci; CZ5: R-13+R-7.5ci; CZ6: R-13+R-15.6ci; CZ7: R-13+R-18.8ci; CZ8: R-13+R-25.0ci.

sections.title: Envelope — Roof/Ceiling Insulation (Insulation Entirely Above Deck)
sections.requirement: Minimum continuous insulation R-values for roofs with insulation entirely above deck by climate zone: CZ1-3: R-20ci; CZ4-8: R-30ci. Roofs shall also meet maximum U-factor requirements: CZ1-3: U-0.048; CZ4-8: U-0.031.

sections.title: Envelope — Roof/Ceiling Insulation (Metal Buildings)
sections.requirement: Minimum insulation R-values for metal building roofs by climate zone: CZ1-2: R-10+R-19; CZ3-5: R-10+R-19; CZ6-8: R-10+R-25. Values represent standing seam roof (above deck) plus liner system requirements.

sections.title: Envelope — Floor Insulation (Mass Floors)
sections.requirement: Minimum insulation R-values for mass floors over unconditioned space by climate zone: CZ1-3: R-0; CZ4-5: R-6.0ci; CZ6-8: R-10.0ci.

sections.title: Envelope — Slab-on-Grade Floor Insulation
sections.requirement: Minimum insulation for slab-on-grade floors by climate zone. Unheated slab: CZ1-3: none; CZ4-5: R-10 for 2 ft; CZ6-8: R-15 for 4 ft. Heated slab: CZ1-3: none; CZ4: R-10 full; CZ5: R-15 full; CZ6-8: R-20 full.

sections.title: Envelope — Fenestration (Vertical Glazing) Maximum U-Factor and SHGC
sections.requirement: Maximum U-factor and SHGC for vertical fenestration by climate zone: CZ1: U-0.50, SHGC-0.25; CZ2: U-0.40, SHGC-0.25; CZ3: U-0.35, SHGC-0.25; CZ4: U-0.35, SHGC-0.40; CZ5: U-0.32, SHGC-0.40; CZ6: U-0.32, SHGC-0.40; CZ7: U-0.28, SHGC-0.40; CZ8: U-0.25, SHGC-0.40.

sections.title: Envelope — Maximum Fenestration Area
sections.requirement: The maximum vertical fenestration area shall not exceed 40 percent of the gross above-grade wall area of the building for all climate zones. Skylights shall not exceed 3 percent of gross roof area.

sections.title: HVAC — Economizers (Air-Side)
sections.requirement: Air-side economizers shall be provided for individual HVAC cooling systems with fan capacity ≥ 2,700 cfm or cooling capacity ≥ 65,000 Btu/h (5.4 tons), except in Climate Zone 1 and 2. Economizer shall be capable of providing up to 100% outdoor air.

sections.title: HVAC — Variable Air Volume (VAV)
sections.requirement: For dual-duct and multizone systems, VAV controls shall be provided. Fans shall use variable speed drives or variable frequency drives (VFD) when supply fan capacity exceeds 5 hp. Minimum turndown ratio: 0.5 of design airflow at 50% of design load.

sections.title: HVAC — Heating and Cooling Controls (Dead Band)
sections.requirement: When both heating and cooling are provided for a zone, zone temperature dead band shall prevent simultaneous heating and cooling. Dead band shall be not less than 5°F. Thermostat setback for unoccupied periods shall be provided: setback to at least 55°F for heating, 90°F for cooling.

sections.title: Lighting — Interior Lighting Power Density (LPD)
sections.requirement: Lighting power density (LPD) shall not exceed the values in Table 9.5.1 (Building Area Method) or Table 9.6.1 (Space-by-Space Method). Representative values: Office: 0.79 W/sf; Retail: 1.26 W/sf; Corridor: 0.41 W/sf; Conference Room: 1.23 W/sf; Lobby: 0.84 W/sf.

sections.title: Lighting — Automatic Shutoff Controls
sections.requirement: Interior lighting in buildings 5,000 sf or larger shall have automatic shutoff controls that turn off lighting when spaces are unoccupied. Acceptable controls: occupancy sensors, scheduled time switches, or a combination. Override shall not exceed 2 hours.

sections.title: Lighting — Daylight Controls
sections.requirement: Daylight responsive controls shall be provided for primary sidelighting zones (within 15 ft of windows with glazing area > 20 sf) and all skylit zones (when skylight area > 900 sf). Controls shall reduce light output by at least 50% when sufficient daylight is available.

sections.title: Other Equipment — Service Water Heating Efficiency
sections.requirement: Service water heating equipment shall meet the minimum efficiency requirements of Table 7.8. Storage water heaters ≤ 12 kW or 40,000 Btu/h: Energy Factor (EF) minimum 0.95. Gas fired storage water heaters: minimum 80% thermal efficiency. Instantaneous gas water heaters: minimum 80% thermal efficiency.

sections.title: Service Water Heating — Piping Insulation
sections.requirement: All piping in service water heating systems shall be thermally insulated. Hot water piping insulation: 1 inch minimum for piping up to 1.5 inch diameter; 1.5 inch minimum for piping 1.5 to 4 inch diameter. Recirculation systems shall have controls to limit operation.

sections.title: Envelope — Continuous Air Barriers
sections.requirement: A continuous air barrier shall be provided for the building envelope in all climate zones. The air barrier shall be continuous across all assemblies of the building envelope and shall have a maximum air permeability not exceeding 0.004 cfm/sf under a pressure differential of 0.3 in w.g.

sections.title: Envelope — Moisture Control
sections.requirement: Vapor retarders and vapor barriers shall be installed in all climate zones as required per Table 5.4.5. Class II vapor retarder required on the warm-in-winter side in Climate Zones 5 through 8. Mandatory in exterior walls and ceilings of conditioned spaces.

sections.title: Power — Electrical Metering
sections.requirement: For buildings with service over 100 kW, a single electrical meter shall be provided for the entire building unless the building has multiple tenants or uses. Buildings over 500,000 sf shall have sub-metering for each of at least the following end uses: HVAC, lighting, other plug loads.
